name: Nordea Invest European Stars
summary: Nordea Invest European Stars is an equity mutual fund launched and managed by Nordea Invest Fund Management A/s. The fund invests in the public equity markets of United Kingdom, France, Germany, Netherlands, and Switzerland. It invests in stocks of companies operating across finance, telecom, energy, commodities, and pharmaceuticals sectors. Nordea Invest European Stars is domiciled in Denmark.
